headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Provides Update for First Quarter 2026
summary: THOMASVILLE, N.C., March 03, 2026--Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) today reported certain less-than-truckload ("LTL") operating metrics for February 2026. Revenue per day decreased by 3.3% as compared to February 2025 due to a 6.8% decrease in LTL tons per day that was partially offset by an increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight. The decrease in LTL tons per day was attributable to a 7.0% decrease in LTL shipments per day that was partially offset by a 0.2% increase in LTL wei

content.title: Old Dominion Freight Line Provides Update for First Quarter 2026

Revenue per day decreased by 3.3% as compared to February 2025 due to a 6.8% decrease in LTL tons per day that was partially offset by an increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight.
